name: markdown-studio
description: Local-first Markdown authoring studio with integrated diagram rendering (Mermaid, PlantUML), SVG support, and secure PDF export.

markdownStudio.plantuml.mode.description: PlantUML rendering mode. MVP only fully supports bundled-jar.

markdownStudio.java.path.description: Path to Java executable used for PlantUML rendering.

markdownStudio.security.blockExternalLin.description: Block external links and remote resources in preview/export by default.
markdownStudio.security.blockExternalLin.deprecationMessage: 非推奨: markdownStudio.security.externalResources.mode を使用してください

markdownStudio.security.externalResource.description: 外部リソースの制御モード
ホワイトリストモードで許可するドメインのリスト

markdownStudio.export.header.enabled.description: Enable header in PDF export. When enabled, a header with the document title is added to each page.

markdownStudio.export.header.template.description: Custom HTML template for the PDF export header. Use Playwright CSS classes (pageNumber, totalPages, title, date, url) for dynamic content. When null, the built-in default template is used.

markdownStudio.export.footer.enabled.description: Enable footer in PDF export. When enabled, a footer with page numbers is added to each page.

markdownStudio.export.footer.template.description: Custom HTML template for the PDF export footer. Use Playwright CSS classes (pageNumber, totalPages, title, date, url) for dynamic content. When null, the built-in default template is used.

markdownStudio.export.pageBreak.enabled.description: Enable CSS page-break support in PDF export. When enabled, page-break-before and page-break-after CSS properties are honored.

markdownStudio.preview.sourceJump.enable.description: Double-click in preview jumps to the corresponding source line.

markdownStudio.style.preset.markdownDescription: Base style preset — sets default font, size, line-height, heading and code-block styles. Priority: **Preset → Individual overrides → Theme → Custom CSS** (each layer overrides the previous).

markdownStudio.style.fontFamily.markdownDescription: Override the preset's font family. Takes priority over the preset default, but can be overridden by Theme or Custom CSS.

markdownStudio.style.fontSize.markdownDescription: Override the preset's font size in pixels (8–32). Takes priority over the preset default, but can be overridden by Theme or Custom CSS.

markdownStudio.style.lineHeight.markdownDescription: Override the preset's line height (1.0–3.0). Takes priority over the preset default, but can be overridden by Theme or Custom CSS.

enumDescriptions: Default — no extra theme, uses preset + individual overrides only
Modern — `body { font-family: Inter, system-ui; }` indigo accents (#6366f1), soft shadows, rounded corners
Markdown PDF — `table { border: none; }` classic look matching the Markdown PDF extension, simple borders
Minimal — `body { max-width: 720px; }` bare-bones, clean starting point for customization
markdownStudio.style.theme.markdownDescription: Visual theme applied on top of the preset. Overrides preset and individual settings. Can be further overridden by Custom CSS.

markdownStudio.style.customCss.markdownDescription:
Final CSS layer — overrides everything above (preset, individual settings, theme). Write CSS rules directly.

**Examples:**

`h1 { color: navy; border-bottom: 2px solid navy; }`

`blockquote { border-left: 3px solid orange; background: #fff8f0; }`

`table { border-collapse: collapse; } th, td { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; }`

`code { background: #f0f0f0; color: #d63384; }`

Full theme samples: [modern.css](https://github.com/kino-6/vscode-markdown-studio/blob/main/examples/custom-styles/modern.css) · [markdown-pdf.css](https://github.com/kino-6/vscode-markdown-studio/blob/main/examples/custom-styles/markdown-pdf.css) · [minimal.css](https://github.com/kino-6/vscode-markdown-studio/blob/main/examples/custom-styles/minimal.css)

markdownStudio.export.margin.description: Page margin for PDF export. Accepts CSS units (mm, cm, in, px).

markdownStudio.toc.levels.description: TOCに含める見出しレベルの範囲（例: '1-3', '2-4'）

markdownStudio.toc.orderedList.description: TOCを番号付きリスト（ol）で生成する

markdownStudio.toc.pageBreak.description: PDFエクスポート時にTOCの前後に改ページを挿入する

markdownStudio.codeBlock.lineNumbers.description: コードブロックに行番号を表示する

markdownStudio.network.caCertificates.description: 追加のCA証明書ファイルパス（PEM形式）。Zscaler等のSSLインスペクション環境で使用。

scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.package: npm run build && rm -f dist/*.vsix && vsce package -o dist/
